title.en: Eternal Dao Ancestor didn't have such a good co...

content.en:
Of course, the War Realm Tower does not unconditionally allow living beings to exchange points for inheritance or resources.

When they exchange points for inheritance or resources, the Warworld Tower will take a certain fee.

Ye Tian and many other half-step domain ancestors such as Eternal Dao Ancestor and Jinchen Dao Ancestor had already decided to participate in the battle to gain points by winning battles.

But Ye Tian was not in a hurry to sign up, his current cultivation was a half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm, although his strength could be comparable to the half-step domain ancestor of the Returning One Realm of the Consummation Realm, but he was not a real one-step Half-step Domain Ancestor of the One Realm after all.

And the Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors around the Douzhan Platform can be said to be tens of thousands, among which there are many Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors whose strength is above him, rather than making a rash move, it is better to take a good look at it first.

However.

Eternal Dao Ancestor didn't have such a good concentration as Ye Tian.

Seeing that the ordinary half-step domain ancestors on the fighting platforms had already divided the winners and losers, the winners of them received the corresponding points bonus, while the loser left the field gloomily and lost the points.

In the Warworld Tower, points are earned through battle challenges.

Someone posts a challenge on the battle leaderboard, and the self-determined points are rewarded, and someone will take the challenge, and the losing side will lose the points to the winning team.

Interestingly, dying in the Warworld Tower is not really death, and the Warworld Tower will protect these people, so they can fight without worrying about falling.

Therefore, there are a lot of half-step domain ancestors who have posted challenge news on the battle list, and there are countless half-step domain ancestors who have accepted the challenge.

After all, dying here is not really death, and it will not damage one's strength and cultivation, and one can also gain combat experience from the battle, thereby improving one's strength.

If you win the challenge, you can get points, and if you lose, you just lose points, and there is no harm to yourself, so this opportunity is really rare.

Moreover, once they win the challenge, they can get a lot of points, and when they have enough points, they can exchange them for inheritance or resources in the Battle Tower, which can be described as a hundred benefits and no harm to them.

Ye Tian checked the battle list, and there were a large number of half-step domain ancestors who had posted challenge information, some with 10 points as a reward, and some with 100 points as a reward to post challenges.

There are even some half-step domain ancestors who post challenge information with hundreds or even thousands of points as rewards!

Ye Tian took a look and found that most of the challenge information released with 10 points was mainly ordinary half-step domain ancestors, and only accepted challenges from ordinary half-step domain ancestors.

Most of the challenge information released with 100 points is mainly based on the half-step domain ancestor of the All Things Realm.

As for the challenge information released with hundreds or even thousands of points, it is mainly the half-step domain ancestors of the Guiyi Realm.

However, in the current battle platform, most of them are ordinary half-step domain ancestors and all things realm half-step domain ancestors fighting, and there are very few half-step domain ancestors of the One Realm.

In this layer of the Half-Step Domain Ancestor, there were a hundred fighting platforms.

The Eternal Dao Ancestor saw that the two ordinary half-step domain ancestors in several fighting platforms had already divided the winners and losers, and the half-step domain ancestors who had won the points looked excited, and the half-step domain ancestors who lost the points basically ended up dead and left the fighting platform.

However, these made the eyes of the Eternal Dao Ancestor more and more eager.

"Wanfa Dao Ancestor, do you want to take on a challenge as well?"

Eternal Dao Ancestral Dao.

With Ye Tian's strength, it can be said that he can directly crush any Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor below the One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and he can earn a lot of points by taking on a few challenges casually.

On the other hand, although his strength is at the level of an ordinary half-step domain ancestor, it is still not strong, and it may not be able to win battles.

However, such an opportunity is hard to come by, and the Eternal Dao Ancestor must try it before he is willing.

Therefore, after some selection, he chose a challenge with 10 points as a reward to accept, and the opponent was also an ordinary half-step domain ancestor, and the other party also agreed to the challenge.

"Now that you've taken on the challenge, let's try your hand first. "

Ye Tian said indifferently.

He wanted to observe it again, besides, the challenge points released now were still not in his eyes, and Ye Tian didn't want to make a move.

"Okay, I'll go first. "

Eternal Dao Ancestor's words fell, and the person entered the fighting platform.

Soon, an ordinary half-step domain ancestor appeared in front of the Eternal Dao Ancestor.

Both were determined to win.

"I am a person from the Bone Grinding City in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Realm, I don't know which force your Excellency belongs to?"

The opponent of the Eternal Dao Ancestor asked.

Dark Forbidden Bone City!

The Eternal Dao Ancestor didn't know anything about the depths of the Dark Forbidden Realm, nor did he know anything about the Bone Grinding City.

It is precisely because of not understanding that there is no fear and worry in my heart.

But he also knew very well that the inheritance cultivated by the ordinary half-step domain ancestor in the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain was much better than the inheritance of the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm and the Divine Heaven Realm, and the other party's cultivation did not seem to be high, and it was still much worse than the realm of all things.

But the strength does not necessarily depend on the level of cultivation, for example, Ye Tian is only a half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Realm, but his real combat power is many times stronger than many half-step domain ancestors of the One Realm.

Therefore, since he has already accepted the challenge, he naturally has to go all out, in case the other party's strength is very weak.

After all, no matter how prosperous a place is, there are also cultivators with weak strength.

"Why so much nonsense!

As soon as the words fell, the Eternal Dao Ancestor launched the first attack!

And when the Eternal Dao Ancestor attacked, the other party also moved!

Bang!

The other party cast a fire forbidden dao technique and turned into a forbidden creature of fire.

The Forbidden Dao Technique of the Eternal Dao Ancestor was broken in an instant, and even the defensive Forbidden Dao Technique was broken, and the Forbidden Body was also penetrated.

Click!!

The Eternal Dao Ancestor's body was torn and he was seriously injured.

Abrupt.

The other party came with another blow and directly killed the Eternal Dao Ancestor.

Almost instantly, the Eternal Dao Ancestor lost this challenge point!

"I didn't expect the opponent to be so weak, I thought the opponent was so strong, I didn't even dare to report which force it belonged to, it seems that it came from a small place. "

The half-step Domain Ancestor who had killed the Eternal Dao Ancestor said proudly.

The Eternal Dao Ancestor's body was condensed again with the help of the Battle Realm Tower, his expression was dark and uncertain at this time, his face was embarrassed, he thought that his strength was not weak at the half-step Domain Ancestor level, but he didn't expect that he would be killed by the opponent in just one or two moves.

Although it is considered death if the body is blown up in the War Realm Tower, the difference in strength is too big.

What happened on the fighting platform, Ye Tian naturally saw it in his eyes.

Although the strength of the Eternal Dao Ancestor was not the highest in the Xuanxu to the Ancient Realm, its strength was also considered to be the top among ordinary half-step domain ancestors, but I didn't expect it to lose easily!

Sure enough, the depths of the Dark Forbidden Domain were the real prosperous areas for cultivation, and the strength of an ordinary ordinary half-step domain ancestor could directly crush the Eternal Dao Ancestor, which was almost comparable to the weaker half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm.

I have to say that the depths of the Dark Forbidden Realm are too mysterious!

This also made Ye Tian understand that the strength of the Dao Ancestors in their Dao Mountain Realm was too weak.
